description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a wooden stock and fore-end paired with a blued steel receiver and barrel. The stock and fore-end are made of polished wood, giving the firearm a traditional and robust appearance. The receiver and barrel are metallic, finished in a dark, glossy black, and the barrel is of medium length with a simple cylindrical profile. The trigger guard and action are integrated into the receiver, and the pump-action mechanism is clearly visible beneath the barrel. There are no visible advanced optics or attachments, only basic iron sights. The overall form is streamlined and functional, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, and a blued steel barrel and receiver. The design is classic and functional, with basic iron sights and no advanced attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the metallic barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the wooden and metallic components from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
